summary: Fixed 3 pagination issues: removed margins creating gaps between bars, fixed arrow disappearing and size change on hover, and added 2px offset so bars appear clearly below circular elements
userRevisions: Remove mr-3 from .prev and ml-3 from .next to eliminate gaps between bars
Remove scale-110 hover effect and background shorthand causing arrow to disappear
Change top: 100% to top: calc(100% + 2px) for clear visual separation from circular elements

changes.description: Eliminated right margin that created gap between prev button and adjacent page numbers
Eliminated left margin that created gap between next button and adjacent page numbers
Removed conflicting background shorthand that was resetting background-image properties. Gradient is already in .prev and .next background-image as second layer.
Eliminated scale-110 transform that was making arrow buttons grow on hover
Increased padding-bottom from 0.5rem to 0.75rem for more room below bars
Added 2px offset to create clear visual gap between circular element and bar
Added 2px offset to create clear visual gap between circular button and bar

issue1_gapsBetweenBars.problem: mr-3 on .prev and ml-3 on .next created margins between arrow buttons and page numbers, causing gaps in the continuous bottom bar line
issue1_gapsBetweenBars.solution: Removed both margin utilities. gap-0 on nav-links handles spacing (no gaps)
issue1_gapsBetweenBars.result: Bottom bars now form truly continuous line with no gaps between any items

issue2_arrowDisappearAndSizeChange.problemA: scale-110 on hover made arrow buttons grow larger
issue2_arrowDisappearAndSizeChange.solutionA: Removed entire &:hover, &:focus block with scale-110 transform
issue2_arrowDisappearAndSizeChange.problemB: background: linear-gradient(...) shorthand was resetting background-image properties, causing SVG arrow to disappear. Then .prev/.next were setting background-image with SVG+gradient layers, creating conflict
issue2_arrowDisappearAndSizeChange.solutionB: Removed background shorthand entirely. .prev and .next already have background-image with gradient as second layer, so redundant background shorthand was causing conflicts
issue2_arrowDisappearAndSizeChange.result: Arrow buttons stay constant size on hover, arrow icons remain visible

issue3_barOverlappingCircle.problem: top: 100% positioned bar at bottom edge of 40x40 box model, but rounded-full creates visual circle where bottom is slightly above box bottom, making bar appear to overlap circle
issue3_barOverlappingCircle.solution: Changed to top: calc(100% + 2px) on all ::after elements. Added 2px offset creates clear visual separation between circle and bar. Increased pb-3 for more room.
issue3_barOverlappingCircle.result: Bars appear clearly below circular elements with visible 2px gap

marginRemoval.spacing: gap-0 on nav-links means no gaps between items
marginRemoval.effect: Bottom bars touch edge-to-edge forming continuous line

backgroundShorthandConflict.problem: background shorthand sets ALL background properties (image, position, size, repeat, etc.) and resets unspecified ones to defaults
backgroundShorthandConflict.conflict: Line 100 background: linear-gradient(...) set background-image, then .prev/.next tried to override with multi-layer background-image (SVG + gradient)
backgroundShorthandConflict.why_it_failed: The shorthand on line 100 was evaluated first, then .prev/.next background-image tried to layer SVG on top, but property conflicts caused SVG to not display
backgroundShorthandConflict.solution: Removed redundant background shorthand. .prev and .next already define complete background-image with both SVG (layer 1) and gradient (layer 2)
backgroundShorthandConflict.result: No conflicts, SVG arrow visible on gradient background

scaleRemoval.reason: Arrow buttons should remain constant size, not grow on hover
scaleRemoval.effect: Stable visual appearance, no size changes

offsetCalculation.before: top: 100% (bar at bottom edge of 40x40 box)
offsetCalculation.reason: rounded-full creates visual circle where bottom is ~38-39px (not 40px), so top: 100% made bar overlap circle visually
offsetCalculation.offset: 2px creates clear visual gap between circle perimeter and bar
offsetCalculation.paddingBottom: pb-3 (0.75rem) provides room for offset bars

bottomBars.gaps: none (gap-0 on container, no margins on items)

verification.accessibility: maintained (ARIA attributes, keyboard support, screen reader announcements)
verification.visualIntegrity: continuous bottom bar line, no gaps, arrows visible, bars clearly below circles
